🗂️ Google Drive Sheets

Connect, sync & manage live Google Sheets across all WSAI modules · People · Inventory · Finance

Google Sheet Connection — Per Module
Not Connected
Module:
👥 People Management 💾 Saved · — ⚪ No URL saved for this module
Extensions → Apps Script → Deploy → Manage Deployments → Copy Web App URL
Last sync: Never
📋 Saved URLs per Module
❌ Connection Blocked — Update doGet() to JSONP Format

The browser blocked the request due to CORS. Fix this by adding JSONP support to your doGet() function in Apps Script. This portal uses a no-library JSONP loader — no npm/CDN needed.

❌ Before (CORS-blocked)
function doGet(e) {
  const data = getData();
  return ContentService
    .createTextOutput(
      JSON.stringify(data)
    )
    .setMimeType(
      ContentService
        .MimeType.JSON
    );
}
✅ After (JSONP — works everywhere)
function doGet(e) {
  const data = getData();
  const cb = (e.parameter
    && e.parameter.callback)
    ? e.parameter.callback
    : 'callback';
  return ContentService
    .createTextOutput(
      cb + '(' +
      JSON.stringify(data) +
      ')'
    )
    .setMimeType(
      ContentService
        .MimeType.JAVASCRIPT
    );
}
📋 Steps to fix:
1. Open your Google Sheet → Extensions → Apps Script
2. Replace your doGet(e) with the JSONP version above
3. Click Deploy → Manage Deployments → New Deployment (or edit existing)
4. Set Execute as: Me · Who has access: Anyone within IIT Madras
5. Copy the new Web App URL and paste it in the Connection panel above
6. Click Connect again — connection will succeed ✅
🛠️ Setup Guide
1️⃣
Open Apps Script in your Sheet
In your Google Sheet go to Extensions → Apps Script. Paste the Code.gs for your WSAI module (People, Inventory, etc.).
2️⃣
Update doGet() to JSONP Format
This portal uses JSONP to bypass browser CORS restrictions — no libraries needed. Replace your doGet(e) with:
function doGet(e) {
  const data = getData(); // your existing fn
  const cb = (e.parameter && e.parameter.callback)
    ? e.parameter.callback : 'callback';
  return ContentService
    .createTextOutput(cb + '(' + JSON.stringify(data) + ')')
    .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JAVASCRIPT);
}
3️⃣
Deploy as Web App
Click Deploy → New Deployment. Set type to Web App, execute as Me, and set access to Anyone within IIT Madras (Google Workspace domain restriction — only @iitm.ac.in accounts can reach the endpoint). Copy the Web App URL and paste it above.
4️⃣
Paste URL & Connect
Paste the Web App URL into the Connection panel above and click Connect. The portal will test the connection and show ● Connected ✓ on success.
5️⃣
Fetch & Sync Data
Click ⬇ Fetch All Sheets to pull live data into the portal. Use ↻ Sync People or per-sheet sync buttons to refresh individual modules at any time.
6️⃣
Set Auto-Sync Trigger
In Apps Script → Triggers, add a time-based trigger for updateAllBalances() to run daily at 8 am for fully automatic refresh without any manual action.

Over Capacity
STATUS_INDICATOR
🎨 Color Legend (v5.1): 🔴 OVER CAPACITY >100% 🟠 HIGH 80–100% 🟡 MEDIUM 50–80% 🟢 LOW 20–50% 🔵 VERY LOW 0–20% ⚪ EMPTY 0% Col H: Avail/Faculty (neg=over-alloc) · Col I: Avail/Room (MAX(0,VLOOKUP−SUMIF)) · Col J: Util% · Col L: Indicator
🔬 Faculty Lab Allocations
# Faculty Category Room Allocated Total Allotted Occupied Avail/Faculty Avail/Room Util % Status Indicator Actions

🏛️ Facility Rooms — Live Status
#Room NameTypeAllocated ToCapacityStatusFlagActions
👥 Active Researcher Lab Registry
#IDNameFaculty / LabRoomDesignationStatusJoiningExitEmailOther AccessActions
🚪 Faculty Room Allocations
#Faculty NameRoom AllocatedStatusActions
✅ Data Validation — Faculty Lab (12-col v5.1)
Mirrors GAS validateAllDataComprehensive() · Cross-checks Col H (Avail/Faculty) · Col I (Avail/Room) · Room capacity vs Facility Rooms
📐 GAS Formula Reference (v5.1)
Col H — Avail/Faculty (can be negative)
=F{ROW} - G{ROW}
Allotted − Occupied. Negative = over-allocated.
Col I — Avail/Room (always ≥ 0)
=IFERROR(MAX(0,VLOOKUP(D{ROW},'Facility Rooms'!$C$2:$D$5000,2,FALSE)-SUMIF($D$2:$D$5000,D{ROW},$G$2:$G$5000)),MAX(0,E{ROW}-SUMIF(...)))
Cross-sheet VLOOKUP room capacity − total occupied. MAX(0,…) floors at 0.
Col J — Utilization Rate
=IF(E{ROW}=0, 0, G{ROW}/E{ROW})
Occupied ÷ Total Seats. Per-faculty row.
Col L — Status Indicator
=IF(cap=0, IF(G=0,"EMPTY","OVER-CAPACITY"), IF(SUMIF(...)>cap,"OVER-CAPACITY", IF(J≥0.8,"HIGH",IF(J≥0.5,"MEDIUM","LOW"))))
Uses Facility Rooms cap via VLOOKUP.
⚡ Quick Actions — mirrors GAS Data Management Menu

📊 Inventory Statistics Dashboard
⚙️ Threshold Manager

🗂️ Dropdown Manager

Add, edit or remove items from any dropdown list across the entire portal. Changes save to the Google Sheet instantly and reflect in every Add/Edit dialog, table filter, chart and visual across all modules.

💡 All changes are immediately live in every Add/Edit form and filter across the portal. When a Google Sheet is connected, edits also sync to the corresponding Vocabulary sheet tab automatically.
Module:
💡 People dropdowns apply to Staff, Faculty, Researcher and Student add/edit forms, and all People module filters.
💡 Asset categories are synced to the Category Vocabulary sheet tab. Changes save immediately and populate all Asset add/edit forms and filters.
💡 Expense categories and statuses apply to the Expense Sheet, Paid Log filters, and all expense add/edit dialogs. Synced to Expense Vocabulary sheet.
💡 Publication options apply to Journal, Conference, Report and Preprint add/edit dialogs, and publication filters. Synced to Publication Vocabulary sheet.
💡 Biometric options apply to the Biometric Access add/edit dialogs and all access-area filters. Synced to Biometric Vocabulary sheet.
💡 Lab options apply to Faculty Lab, Facility Rooms, and Active Researcher add/edit forms and filters. Synced to Lab Vocabulary sheet.
💡 Inventory options apply to the Gifts & Inventory module add/edit forms and filters. Synced to Inventory Vocabulary sheet.
